purpose: Record foundation for future skill-based feat implementation.

implementedFoundation.name: ExtraSkillUseRegistry
implementedFoundation.summary: Provides stable IDs for extra skill uses/tasks such as deception.feint, persuasion.intimidate, acrobatics.tumble, use-computer.hack-system, and mechanics.disable-device. Supports dynamic registration and alternate allowed skills.

implementedFoundation.name: SkillFeatRuleResolver
implementedFoundation.summary: Generic resolver for feat/talent/species/class skill rules. Groups rules into bonuses, extra-use bonuses, ability substitutions, skill substitutions, action economy overrides, granted extra uses, rerolls, result riders, DC overrides, Take 10 overrides, retry overrides, and advisory rules.

implementedFoundation.name: Reroll support
implementedFoundation.summary: Reroll rules normalize to either keepBetter or keepSecond. Metadata supports oncePer limits, costs/consumes fields, mayChooseAfterRoll, appliesAfterFailureKnown, advisoryOnly, and extra-use scoping.

implementedFoundation.name: Init registration
implementedFoundation.summary: registerSkillFeatRuleResolver initializes the registry and exposes game.swse.skills.SkillFeatRuleResolver and game.swse.skills.ExtraSkillUseRegistry.

integrationBoundary.currentPass: Foundation only. It exposes resolver APIs and stable extra skill use IDs without forcing skill roll UI behavior yet.
integrationBoundary.nextPass: Wire SkillFeatRuleResolver into skill roll dialog, skill tooltip/breakdown, extra skill use action cards, and skill chat reroll controls. Existing SkillFeatResolver remains intact and can be bridged or retired later after parity verification.
integrationBoundary.important: Do not duplicate skill bonuses into ModifierEngine unless they are always-on global modifiers. Contextual skill feat behavior should flow through SkillFeatRuleResolver.
